    "jsx": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Button, Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => {\n  const [disabled, setDisabled] = useState(true);\n  const toggleDisabled = () => {\n    setDisabled(!disabled);\n  };\n  return (\n    <>\n      <Radio defaultChecked={false} disabled={disabled}>\n        Disabled\n      </Radio>\n      <Radio defaultChecked disabled={disabled}>\n        Disabled\n      </Radio>\n      <br />\n      <Button\n        type=\"primary\"\n        onClick={toggleDisabled}\n        style={{\n          marginTop: 16,\n        }}\n      >\n        Toggle disabled\n      </Button>\n    </>\n  );\n};\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>Radio 不可用。</p>"
  }

    "jsx": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => {\n  const [value, setValue] = useState(1);\n  const onChange = (e) => {\n    console.log('radio checked', e.target.value);\n    setValue(e.target.value);\n  };\n  return (\n    <Radio.Group onChange={onChange} value={value}>\n      <Radio value={1}>A</Radio>\n      <Radio value={2}>B</Radio>\n      <Radio value={3}>C</Radio>\n      <Radio value={4}>D</Radio>\n    </Radio.Group>\n  );\n};\nexport default App;\n",

    "jsx": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Input, Radio, Space } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => {\n  const [value, setValue] = useState(1);\n  const onChange = (e) => {\n    console.log('radio checked', e.target.value);\n    setValue(e.target.value);\n  };\n  return (\n    <Radio.Group onChange={onChange} value={value}>\n      <Space direction=\"vertical\">\n        <Radio value={1}>Option A</Radio>\n        <Radio value={2}>Option B</Radio>\n        <Radio value={3}>Option C</Radio>\n        <Radio value={4}>\n          More...\n          {value === 4 ? (\n            <Input\n              style={{\n                width: 100,\n                marginLeft: 10,\n              }}\n            />\n          ) : null}\n        </Radio>\n      </Space>\n    </Radio.Group>\n  );\n};\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>垂直的 Radio.Group，配合更多输入框选项。</p>"
  }

    "jsx": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Radio } from 'antd';\nconst plainOptions = ['Apple', 'Pear', 'Orange'];\nconst options = [\n  {\n    label: 'Apple',\n    value: 'Apple',\n  },\n  {\n    label: 'Pear',\n    value: 'Pear',\n  },\n  {\n    label: 'Orange',\n    value: 'Orange',\n    title: 'Orange',\n  },\n];\nconst optionsWithDisabled = [\n  {\n    label: 'Apple',\n    value: 'Apple',\n  },\n  {\n    label: 'Pear',\n    value: 'Pear',\n  },\n  {\n    label: 'Orange',\n    value: 'Orange',\n    disabled: true,\n  },\n];\nconst App = () => {\n  const [value1, setValue1] = useState('Apple');\n  const [value2, setValue2] = useState('Apple');\n  const [value3, setValue3] = useState('Apple');\n  const [value4, setValue4] = useState('Apple');\n  const onChange1 = ({ target: { value } }) => {\n    console.log('radio1 checked', value);\n    setValue1(value);\n  };\n  const onChange2 = ({ target: { value } }) => {\n    console.log('radio2 checked', value);\n    setValue2(value);\n  };\n  const onChange3 = ({ target: { value } }) => {\n    console.log('radio3 checked', value);\n    setValue3(value);\n  };\n  const onChange4 = ({ target: { value } }) => {\n    console.log('radio4 checked', value);\n    setValue4(value);\n  };\n  return (\n    <>\n      <Radio.Group options={plainOptions} onChange={onChange1} value={value1} />\n      <br />\n      <Radio.Group options={optionsWithDisabled} onChange={onChange2} value={value2} />\n      <br />\n      <br />\n      <Radio.Group options={options} onChange={onChange3} value={value3} optionType=\"button\" />\n      <br />\n      <br />\n      <Radio.Group\n        options={optionsWithDisabled}\n        onChange={onChange4}\n        value={value4}\n        optionType=\"button\"\n        buttonStyle=\"solid\"\n      />\n    </>\n  );\n};\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>通过配置 <code>options</code> 参数来渲染单选框。也可通过 <code>optionType</code> 参数来设置 Radio 类型。</p>"
  }
}, {

      "throttle-debounce": "^5.0.0"
    },
    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { Flex, Radio } from 'antd';\nconst onChange = (e) => {\n  console.log(`radio checked:${e.target.value}`);\n};\nconst App = () => (\n  <Flex vertical gap=\"middle\">\n    <Radio.Group onChange={onChange} defaultValue=\"a\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n    <Radio.Group onChange={onChange} defaultValue=\"a\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\" disabled>\n        Shanghai\n      </Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n    <Radio.Group disabled onChange={onChange} defaultValue=\"a\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n  </Flex>\n);\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>按钮样式的单选组合。</p>"
  }
}, {

    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => (\n  <Radio.Group name=\"radiogroup\" defaultValue={1}>\n    <Radio value={1}>A</Radio>\n    <Radio value={2}>B</Radio>\n    <Radio value={3}>C</Radio>\n    <Radio value={4}>D</Radio>\n  </Radio.Group>\n);\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>可以为 Radio.Group 配置 <code>name</code> 参数，为组合内的 input 元素赋予相同的 <code>name</code> 属性，使浏览器把 Radio.Group 下的 Radio 真正看作是一组（例如可以通过方向键始终<strong>在同一组内</strong>更改选项）。</p>"
  }

    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { Flex, Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => (\n  <Flex vertical gap=\"middle\">\n    <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\" size=\"large\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n    <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n    <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\" size=\"small\">\n      <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n      <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n    </Radio.Group>\n  </Flex>\n);\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>大中小三种组合，可以和表单输入框进行对应配合。</p>"
  }

    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { Badge, Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => (\n  <Radio.Group buttonStyle=\"solid\">\n    <Badge count={1}>\n      <Radio.Button value={1}>Click Me</Radio.Button>\n    </Badge>\n    <Badge count={2}>\n      <Radio.Button value={2}>Not Me</Radio.Button>\n    </Badge>\n  </Radio.Group>\n);\nexport default App;\n",

    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { ConfigProvider, Radio } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => (\n  <ConfigProvider\n    theme={{\n      token: {\n        wireframe: true,\n      },\n    }}\n  >\n    <Radio.Group value={1}>\n      <Radio value={1}>A</Radio>\n      <Radio value={2}>B</Radio>\n      <Radio value={3}>C</Radio>\n      <Radio value={4}>D</Radio>\n    </Radio.Group>\n    <br />\n    <Radio.Group value={1} disabled>\n      <Radio value={1}>A</Radio>\n      <Radio value={2}>B</Radio>\n      <Radio value={3}>C</Radio>\n      <Radio value={4}>D</Radio>\n    </Radio.Group>\n  </ConfigProvider>\n);\nexport default App;\n",

    "jsx": "import React from 'react';\nimport { ConfigProvider, Radio, Space } from 'antd';\nconst App = () => (\n  <ConfigProvider\n    theme={{\n      components: {\n        Radio: {\n          radioSize: 20,\n          dotSize: 10,\n          dotColorDisabled: 'grey',\n          buttonBg: '#f6ffed',\n          buttonCheckedBg: '#d9f7be',\n          buttonColor: '#faad14',\n          buttonPaddingInline: 20,\n          buttonCheckedBgDisabled: '#fffbe6',\n          buttonCheckedColorDisabled: '#ffe58f',\n          buttonSolidCheckedColor: '#ffa39e',\n          wrapperMarginInlineEnd: 20,\n        },\n      },\n    }}\n  >\n    <Space direction=\"vertical\">\n      <Radio checked>Test</Radio>\n      <Radio checked disabled>\n        Disabled\n      </Radio>\n      <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\">\n        <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n      </Radio.Group>\n      <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\" disabled>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n      </Radio.Group>\n      <Radio.Group defaultValue=\"a\" buttonStyle=\"solid\">\n        <Radio.Button value=\"a\">Hangzhou</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"b\">Shanghai</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"c\">Beijing</Radio.Button>\n        <Radio.Button value=\"d\">Chengdu</Radio.Button>\n      </Radio.Group>\n    </Space>\n  </ConfigProvider>\n);\nexport default App;\n",
    "description": "<p>组件 token debug</p>"
  }

}
